name: OLAP Data Transformation - Content Marketing Performance

parameters.query:
-- Staging for LinkedIn Posts (Company Page)
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW staging.stg_zernio__linkedin_posts AS
SELECT 
  id AS post_id,
  content AS content,
  url AS post_url,
  published_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin' AS published_at_berlin,
  fetched_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin' AS fetched_at_berlin
FROM s_zernio.linkedin_posts;

-- Staging for LinkedIn Post Analytics (Company Page)
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW staging.stg_zernio__linkedin_post_analytics AS
SELECT 
  post_id AS post_id,
  COALESCE(impressions, 0) AS impressions,
  COALESCE(likes, 0) AS likes,
  COALESCE(comments, 0) AS comments,
  COALESCE(shares, 0) AS shares,
  COALESCE(clicks, 0) AS clicks,
  COALESCE(saves, 0) AS saves,
  COALESCE(sends, 0) AS sends,
  fetched_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin' AS fetched_at_berlin
FROM s_zernio.linkedin_post_analytics;

-- Staging for LinkedIn Personal Posts
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW staging.stg_linkedin__ugc_posts AS
SELECT 
  id AS post_id,
  content AS content,
  MD5(LOWER(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(content, ''), '^"+|"+$', '', 'g')), '\s+', '', 'g'))) AS content_hash,
  url AS post_url,
  published_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin' AS published_at_berlin
FROM s_linkedin.ugc_posts;

-- Staging for LinkedIn Personal Post Likes
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW staging.stg_linkedin__social_action_likes AS
SELECT 
  post_id AS post_id,
  COUNT(id) AS likes_count
FROM s_linkedin.social_action_likes
GROUP BY post_id;

-- Staging for LinkedIn Personal Post Comments
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW staging.stg_linkedin__social_action_comments AS
SELECT 
  post_id AS post_id,
  COUNT(id) AS comments_count
FROM s_linkedin.social_action_comments
GROUP BY post_id;

-- Staging for Buffer LinkedIn Posts
-- NOTE: due_at is stored as timestamp without time zone in UTC, so we must cast AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' first
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW staging.stg_buffer__linkedin_posts AS
SELECT 
  p.id AS buffer_post_id,
  p.text AS content,
  MD5(LOWER(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(COALESCE(p.text, '')), '\s+', '', 'g'))) AS content_hash,
  p.due_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin' AS published_at_berlin,
  COALESCE(p.reactions, 0) AS likes,
  COALESCE(p.comments, 0) AS comments,
  COALESCE(p.shares, 0) AS shares,
  COALESCE(p.reposts, 0) AS reposts,
  COALESCE(p.clicks, 0) AS clicks,
  COALESCE(p.reach, 0) AS reach,
  COALESCE(p.impressions, 0) AS impressions,
  COALESCE(p.views, 0) AS views,
  COALESCE(p.engagement_rate, 0.0000) AS engagement_rate
FROM s_buffer.posts p
JOIN s_buffer.channels c ON p.channel_id = c.id
WHERE c.service = 'linkedin';

-- Intermediate Layer (Company Page)
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW intermediate.int_linkedin_post_engagement AS
SELECT 
  p.post_id AS post_id,
  p.content AS content,
  p.post_url AS post_url,
  p.published_at_berlin AS published_at_berlin,
  a.impressions AS impressions,
  a.likes AS likes,
  a.comments AS comments,
  a.shares AS shares,
  a.clicks AS clicks,
  a.saves AS saves,
  a.sends AS sends,
  (a.likes + a.comments + a.shares + a.clicks + a.saves + a.sends) AS total_interactions,
  CASE 
    WHEN a.impressions > 0 THEN 
      ROUND((a.likes + a.comments + a.shares + a.clicks + a.saves + a.sends)::NUMERIC / a.impressions, 4)
    ELSE 0.0000 
  END AS engagement_rate,
  NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin' AS calculated_at_berlin
FROM staging.stg_zernio__linkedin_posts p
LEFT JOIN staging.stg_zernio__linkedin_post_analytics a ON p.post_id = a.post_id;

-- Intermediate Layer (Personal Account)
-- Join strategy: match LinkedIn posts to Buffer posts by timestamp proximity (within 5 min).
-- Buffer stores due_at in UTC (timestamp without tz); LinkedIn stores published_at as timestamptz.
-- After both are converted to Berlin time they align within <1 second for the same post.
-- Content cannot be used as a hash key because Buffer stores drafts, LinkedIn stores final edits.
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW intermediate.int_linkedin_personal_post_engagement AS
WITH personal_posts_joined AS (
  SELECT 
    p.post_id AS urn,
    regexp_replace(p.post_id, '^.*:', '') AS linkedin_post_id,
    p.content AS content,
    p.post_url AS post_url,
    p.published_at_berlin AS published_at_berlin,
    COALESCE(l.likes_count, 0) AS likes_count,
    COALESCE(c.comments_count, 0) AS comments_count
  FROM staging.stg_linkedin__ugc_posts p
  LEFT JOIN staging.stg_linkedin__social_action_likes l ON p.post_id = l.post_id
  LEFT JOIN staging.stg_linkedin__social_action_comments c ON p.post_id = c.post_id
),
-- Pick the single closest Buffer post per LinkedIn post (within 5 min)
linkedin_enriched AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (p.linkedin_post_id)
    p.linkedin_post_id::TEXT,
    p.urn::TEXT,
    p.content,
    p.post_url,
    p.published_at_berlin,
    p.likes_count,
    p.comments_count,
    COALESCE(b.impressions, 0) AS impressions,
    COALESCE(b.likes, 0)    AS buf_likes,
    COALESCE(b.comments, 0) AS buf_comments,
    COALESCE(b.shares, 0)   AS buf_shares,
    COALESCE(b.reposts, 0)  AS buf_reposts,
    COALESCE(b.clicks, 0)   AS buf_clicks
  FROM personal_posts_joined p
  LEFT JOIN staging.stg_buffer__linkedin_posts b
    ON ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (p.published_at_berlin - b.published_at_berlin))) < 300
  ORDER BY p.linkedin_post_id, ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (p.published_at_berlin - b.published_at_berlin))) ASC
),
-- Buffer posts with no LinkedIn match within 5 min (keep them for completeness)
buffer_unmatched AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM staging.stg_buffer__linkedin_posts b
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM personal_posts_joined p
    WHERE ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (p.published_at_berlin - b.published_at_berlin))) < 300
  )
)
SELECT
  e.linkedin_post_id AS linkedin_post_id,
  e.urn AS urn,
  e.content AS content,
  e.post_url AS post_url,
  e.published_at_berlin AS published_at_berlin,
  e.impressions AS impressions,
  GREATEST(e.likes_count, e.buf_likes) AS likes,
  GREATEST(e.comments_count, e.buf_comments) AS comments,
  e.buf_shares AS shares,
  e.buf_reposts AS reposts,
  e.buf_clicks AS clicks,
  0 AS saves,
  0 AS sends,
  (GREATEST(e.likes_count, e.buf_likes) + GREATEST(e.comments_count, e.buf_comments) + e.buf_shares + e.buf_reposts + e.buf_clicks) AS total_interactions,
  CASE WHEN e.impressions > 0 THEN
    ROUND((GREATEST(e.likes_count, e.buf_likes) + GREATEST(e.comments_count, e.buf_comments) + e.buf_shares + e.buf_reposts + e.buf_clicks)::NUMERIC / e.impressions, 4)
    ELSE 0.0000
  END AS engagement_rate,
  NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin' AS calculated_at_berlin
FROM linkedin_enriched e

UNION ALL

SELECT
  bm.buffer_post_id::TEXT AS linkedin_post_id,
  NULL::TEXT AS urn,
  bm.content AS content,
  NULL::TEXT AS post_url,
  bm.published_at_berlin AS published_at_berlin,
  bm.impressions AS impressions,
  bm.likes AS likes,
  bm.comments AS comments,
  bm.shares AS shares,
  bm.reposts AS reposts,
  bm.clicks AS clicks,
  0 AS saves,
  0 AS sends,
  (bm.likes + bm.comments + bm.shares + bm.reposts + bm.clicks) AS total_interactions,
  CASE WHEN bm.impressions > 0 THEN
    ROUND((bm.likes + bm.comments + bm.shares + bm.reposts + bm.clicks)::NUMERIC / bm.impressions, 4)
    ELSE 0.0000
  END AS engagement_rate,
  NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin' AS calculated_at_berlin
FROM buffer_unmatched bm;

-- Marts Layer (Company Page)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS marts.fct_linkedin_company_page_post_engagement (
  post_id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
  content TEXT,
  post_url VARCHAR(2048),
  published_at_berlin TIMESTAMP,
  impressions INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  likes INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  comments INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  shares INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  clicks INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  saves INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  sends INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  total_interactions INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  engagement_rate DECIMAL(10, 4) DEFAULT 0.0000,
  calculated_at_berlin TIMESTAMP DEFAULT (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin')
);

INSERT INTO marts.fct_linkedin_company_page_post_engagement (
  post_id, content, post_url, published_at_berlin,
  impressions, likes, comments, shares, clicks, saves, sends,
  total_interactions, engagement_rate, calculated_at_berlin
)
SELECT 
  post_id AS post_id,
  content AS content,
  post_url AS post_url,
  published_at_berlin AS published_at_berlin,
  impressions AS impressions,
  likes AS likes,
  comments AS comments,
  shares AS shares,
  clicks AS clicks,
  saves AS saves,
  sends AS sends,
  total_interactions AS total_interactions,
  engagement_rate AS engagement_rate,
  calculated_at_berlin AS calculated_at_berlin
FROM intermediate.int_linkedin_post_engagement
ON CONFLICT (post_id) DO UPDATE SET
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  post_url = EXCLUDED.post_url,
  published_at_berlin = EXCLUDED.published_at_berlin,
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  likes = EXCLUDED.likes,
  comments = EXCLUDED.comments,
  shares = EXCLUDED.shares,
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  saves = EXCLUDED.saves,
  sends = EXCLUDED.sends,
  total_interactions = EXCLUDED.total_interactions,
  engagement_rate = EXCLUDED.engagement_rate,
  calculated_at_berlin = EXCLUDED.calculated_at_berlin;

-- Marts Layer (Personal Account)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS marts.fct_linkedin_personal_account_post_engagement (
  linkedin_post_id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
  urn VARCHAR(255),
  content TEXT,
  post_url VARCHAR(2048),
  published_at_berlin TIMESTAMP,
  impressions INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  likes INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  comments INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  shares INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  reposts INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  clicks INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  saves INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  sends INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  total_interactions INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  engagement_rate DECIMAL(10, 4) DEFAULT 0.0000,
  calculated_at_berlin TIMESTAMP DEFAULT (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin')
);

INSERT INTO marts.fct_linkedin_personal_account_post_engagement (
  linkedin_post_id, urn, content, post_url, published_at_berlin,
  impressions, likes, comments, shares, reposts, clicks, saves, sends,
  total_interactions, engagement_rate, calculated_at_berlin
)
SELECT 
  linkedin_post_id AS linkedin_post_id,
  urn AS urn,
  content AS content,
  post_url AS post_url,
  published_at_berlin AS published_at_berlin,
  impressions AS impressions,
  likes AS likes,
  comments AS comments,
  shares AS shares,
  reposts AS reposts,
  clicks AS clicks,
  saves AS saves,
  sends AS sends,
  total_interactions AS total_interactions,
  engagement_rate AS engagement_rate,
  calculated_at_berlin AS calculated_at_berlin
FROM intermediate.int_linkedin_personal_post_engagement
ON CONFLICT (linkedin_post_id) DO UPDATE SET
  urn = EXCLUDED.urn,
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  post_url = EXCLUDED.post_url,
  published_at_berlin = EXCLUDED.published_at_berlin,
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  likes = EXCLUDED.likes,
  comments = EXCLUDED.comments,
  shares = EXCLUDED.shares,
  reposts = EXCLUDED.reposts,
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  saves = EXCLUDED.saves,
  sends = EXCLUDED.sends,
  total_interactions = EXCLUDED.total_interactions,
  engagement_rate = EXCLUDED.engagement_rate,
  calculated_at_berlin = EXCLUDED.calculated_at_berlin;
